title: Lethedon microphylla
taxonomy: Lethedon microphylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It is a part of the genus Lethedon, which is a group of flowering plants. The family Ericaceae is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the heath family. This family includes many other well-known plants, such as blueberries and rhododendrons. Lethedon microphylla is native to China.
